Effortless Style

Casual Dresses

Contemporary everyday dresses for the modern woman. Wrap styles, tiered maxis, and versatile day-to-night pieces.

Bestseller SKU: FFC-001

Navy base with white floral print, V-neck wrap closure, short flutter sleeves, cotton blend.

$22-32 MOQ: 50 pcs

Dusty blue with micro dot print, tiered ruffle skirt, flutter sleeves, elastic waist, viscose.

$24-36 MOQ: 50 pcs

Classic white and navy stripe, button-front, roll-tab sleeves, self-tie belt, cotton poplin.

$20-30 MOQ: 50 pcs
SKU: FFC-004

Olive green solid, tiered skirt, cap sleeves, side pockets, breathable cotton rayon blend.

$22-33 MOQ: 50 pcs

Polka Dot Wrap Dress

Classic black with white polka dots, wrap closure, 3/4 sleeves, knee-length, jersey knit.

$21-31 MOQ: 50 pcs

Paisley Print Maxi Dress

Rust and burgundy paisley print, smocked bodice, adjustable straps, flowing skirt.
